@property --pm-us-beam-angle {
  syntax: '<angle>';
  initial-value: 0deg;
  inherits: true;
}

.pm-us-beam {
  animation:
    pm-us-beam-spin var(--pm-us-beam-duration, 1.96s) linear infinite,
    pm-us-beam-fade 0.9s ease 0.45s both;
}

.pm-us-beam::before,
.pm-us-beam::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.pm-us-beam::after {
  background:
    conic-gradient(
      from var(--pm-us-beam-angle),
      transparent 0%, transparent 54%,

      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75) 66%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 69%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 72%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 75%,
      transparent 78%, transparent 100%
    ),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 140px 80px at 33% -7.4%, rgb(200, 220, 255), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 120px 70px at 12% -5%, rgb(140, 176, 250), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 80px 140px at 2.1% 68.3%, rgb(255, 255, 255), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40px 70px at 2.1% 68.3%, rgb(150, 190, 255), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 360px 64px at 74.4% 100%, rgb(120, 160, 252), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 170px 52px at 55% 100%, rgb(170, 200, 255), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 148px 64px at 93.9% 0%, rgb(255, 255, 255), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 52px 84px at 100% 27.1%, rgb(140, 176, 250), transparent),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 104px 96px at 100% 27.1%, rgb(100, 145, 250), transparent);
  -webkit-mask-image: conic-gradient(
  from var(--pm-us-beam-angle),
  transparent 0%, transparent 30%,
  rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 36%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35) 44%,
  #fff 52%, #fff 80%,
  rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35) 86%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 92%,

  mask-size: 100% 100%;
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-composite: intersect;
  opacity: calc(var(--pm-us-beam-effect-opacity, 0.6) * 0.9);
}

.pm-us-beam-bloom {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  background: conic-gradient(
    from var(--pm-us-beam-angle),
    transparent 0%, transparent 58%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 62%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 65%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 67%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45) 69%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) 70%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) 70.5%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45) 71.5%,
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 73%,

.pm-us-beam-symbol-fill {
  fill: #8CB0FA;
  opacity: var(--pm-us-beam-fill-opacity, 0.05);
}

.pm-us-beam-symbol-stroke {
  stroke: white;
  stroke-opacity: var(--pm-us-beam-line-opacity, 0.1);
  stroke-width: 1;
}

@keyframes pm-us-beam-spin {
  to { --pm-us-beam-angle: 360deg; }
}

@keyframes pm-us-beam-fade {
  from { opacity: 0; }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .pm-us-beam { display: none; }
}

  background: var(--bprogress-color);
  position: fixed;
  z-index: var(--bprogress-z-index);
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--bprogress-height);
}

/* Fancy blur effect */
.bprogress .peg {
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  width: 100px;
  height: 100%;
  box-shadow: var(--bprogress-box-shadow);
  opacity: 1.0;
  transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
}

/* Remove these to get rid of the spinner */
.bprogress .spinner {
  display: block;
  position: fixed;
  z-index: var(--bprogress-z-index);
  top: var(--bprogress-spinner-top);
  bottom: var(--bprogress-spinner-bottom);
  right: var(--bprogress-spinner-right);
  left: var(--bprogress-spinner-left);
}

.bprogress .spinner-icon {
  width: var(--bprogress-spinner-size);
  height: var(--bprogress-spinner-size);
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border: solid var(--bprogress-spinner-border-size) transparent;
  border-top-color: var(--bprogress-color);
  border-left-color: var(--bprogress-color);
  border-radius: 50%;
  -webkit-animation: bprogress-spinner var(--bprogress-spinner-animation-duration) linear infinite;
  animation: bprogress-spinner var(--bprogress-spinner-animation-duration) linear infinite;
}

.bprogress-custom-parent {
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}

.bprogress-custom-parent .bprogress .spinner,
.bprogress-custom-parent .bprogress .bar {
  position: absolute;
}

.bprogress .indeterminate {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--bprogress-height);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.bprogress .indeterminate .inc,
.bprogress .indeterminate .dec {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  height: 100%;
  background-color: var(--bprogress-color);
}

.bprogress .indeterminate .inc {
  animation: bprogress-indeterminate-increase 2s infinite;
}

.bprogress .indeterminate .dec {
  animation: bprogress-indeterminate-decrease 2s 0.5s infinite;
}

@-webkit-keyframes bprogress-spinner {
  0%   { -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg); transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg); transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

@keyframes bprogress-spinner {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

@keyframes bprogress-indeterminate-increase {
  from { left: -5%; width: 5%; }
  to { left: 130%; width: 100%; }
}

@keyframes bprogress-indeterminate-decrease {
  from { left: -80%; width: 80%; }
  to { left: 110%; width: 10%; }
}

The left-side navigation makes it easy to drill into subcategories like Pre-Market or Weekly to focus on the topics you follow most closely."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What moves 5 Min prediction market prices?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"5 Min markets are driven by the same catalysts that move the underlying real-world story: official announcements, scheduled events and deadlines, data and reporting, and major news. For a market like \"Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET\", watch for upcoming dates, related Crypto releases, and shifts in the broader Pre-Market and Weekly markets, all of which can change the implied probability traders assign to each outcome."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Where can I see live Crypto odds and trading volume?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Every market card on Crypto and 5 Min pages displays the current implied probability for each outcome along with 24-hour or cumulative trading volume. For deeper detail, including price history, the order book, and full resolution rules, click into any individual market such as \"Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET\"."}}]}</script><h2 class="mb-2 text-[16px] font-semibold text-text-primary" data-aria-hidden="true" aria-hidden="true">Frequently Asked Questions</h2><div class="w-full" data-orientation="vertical" data-aria-hidden="true" aria-hidden="true"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_4bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>What is Polymarket?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_4bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none; --radix-collapsible-content-width: 1217px;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Polymarket is the world's largest prediction market, where users trade on the real-world outcomes of events across Crypto and many other topics. Prices are quoted from 0 to 100 cents and reflect the implied probability that an event will occur. Because traders put real money behind their views, Polymarket odds represent a real-time, skin-in-the-game consensus, often referred to as the "wisdom of the crowd."</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_4jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>What is a 5 Min prediction market?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_4jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none; --radix-collapsible-content-width: 1217px;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">A 5 Min prediction market lets users trade Yes or No shares on a specific question tied to 5 Min-related events, such as "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET". Each share pays out $1 if the outcome resolves in its favor, and $0 if it does not. The current share price, for example, 90% in "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET", reflects the market's implied probability at any given moment.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_4rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>What topics can I trade on in the Crypto category?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_4rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none; --radix-collapsible-content-width: 1217px;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">The Crypto category hosts 328 markets covering a wide range of subjects. Popular subcategories include Pre-Market, Weekly, and Bitcoin, each with its own dedicated page showing live odds, trading volume, and active markets. You can browse the full list of Crypto subcategories from the left-side navigation on the Crypto page.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_53sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_13sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>How do Crypto odds on Polymarket work?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_53sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_13sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none; --radix-collapsible-content-width: 1217px;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Every Crypto market on Polymarket has outcomes priced between 0¢ and 100¢. That price is the implied probability of the outcome occurring. For example, if "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET" is trading at 90%, traders are collectively pricing in roughly that probability. Prices update continuously as new information, data releases, and events move trader sentiment.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_5bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_1bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>Which 5 Min markets are most active right now?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_5bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none; --radix-collapsible-content-width: 1217px;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Activity is constantly shifting, but you can sort the page by 24-hour volume to see where trading is concentrated. Currently, "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET" is among the most actively traded markets on the 5 Min page, alongside other high-volume markets like "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET" and "Ethereum Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET".</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0" style="display:none"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_5jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_1jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>How are Crypto prediction markets resolved?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_5jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Each Crypto market has a clearly defined resolution source and criteria published on the market page. When the event concludes, for example, when a result is officially reported, a deadline passes, or an authoritative source confirms the outcome, the market resolves and winning shares pay out $1 each. Markets in categories such as Elections, Economy, and Geopolitics typically rely on official government, regulatory, or primary-source reporting for resolution.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0" style="display:none"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_5rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_1rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>Why do Crypto odds change so often?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_5rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_1rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Crypto markets respond in real time to news, announcements, data releases, and policy shifts. A single development, such as a new poll, economic indicator, court ruling, or geopolitical event, can materially change the implied probability of an outcome. Looking at markets like "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET", price movements reflect traders continuously updating their views as fresh information arrives.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0" style="display:none"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_63sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_23sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>How many Crypto markets are on Polymarket?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_63sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_23sbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Polymarket currently lists 328 markets in the Crypto category, with 7 of those in 5 Min alone. The left-side navigation shows live market counts for every subcategory, including Pre-Market, Weekly, and Bitcoin, so you can quickly see where coverage is deepest.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0" style="display:none"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_6bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_2bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>Can I trade on future Crypto events before they happen?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_6bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2bsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Yes. Most Crypto markets are designed to let users trade well ahead of the underlying event, from short-horizon weekly markets to long-dated markets covering outcomes months or years away. Examples currently listed include "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET" and "Ethereum Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET", which let traders take positions as new information emerges over the life of the market.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0" style="display:none"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_6jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_2jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>Are Polymarket's Crypto odds more accurate than polls or forecasts?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_6jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2jsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">Prediction markets and traditional forecasts, such as polls, models, or analyst estimates, are complementary tools. Because Polymarket traders are risking real capital, Crypto odds aggregate many participants' information and incentives into a single probability, a mechanism that has historically tracked real-world outcomes closely in domains like Elections, Economy, and Geopolitics. That said, no market is a guarantee; odds represent trader consensus at a point in time, not a prediction of what will happen.</div></div></div><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="border-b border-border last:border-b-0" style="display:none"><h3 class="text-[14px] font-normal" data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_6rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_2rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" class="group flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5 text-start text-[14px] text-text-primary transition-colors hover:text-text-secondary lg:py-6" data-radix-collection-item=""><span>How do I start trading Crypto markets on Polymarket?</span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="12px" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 12 12" class="ml-4 shrink-0 transform transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"><polyline points="1.75 4.25 6 8.5 10.25 4.25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline></svg></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_6rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" role="region" aria-labelledby="radix-_R_2rsbdav5ubrcj4qmqivb_" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden data-[state=closed]:h-0 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=closed]:animate-accordionSlideUp data-[state=open]:animate-accordionSlideDown" style="--radix-accordion-content-height: var(--radix-collapsible-content-height); --radix-accordion-content-width: var(--radix-collapsible-content-width); transition-duration: 0s; animation-name: none;"><div class="pb-5 text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-text-primary lg:pb-6">You can browse the Crypto page to see active markets, open any market such as "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 6, 3:40PM-3:45PM ET" to view its order book and full rules, and then trade Yes or No shares once your account is funded. Examples currently listed include {featuredMarket1} and {featuredMarket2}, which let traders take positions as new information emerges over the life of the market.\",\"aGeneric\":\"Yes. Most {categoryLabel} markets are designed to let users trade well ahead of the underlying event, from short-horizon weekly markets to long-dated markets covering outcomes months or years away.\"},\"q10\":{\"q\":\"Are Polymarket's {categoryLabel} odds more accurate than polls or forecasts?\",\"a\":\"Prediction markets and traditional forecasts, such as polls, models, or analyst estimates, are complementary tools. Because Polymarket traders are risking real capital, {categoryLabel} odds aggregate many participants' information and incentives into a single probability, a mechanism that has historically tracked real-world outcomes closely in domains like Elections, Economy, and Geopolitics. That said, no market is a guarantee; odds represent trader consensus at a point in time, not a prediction of what will happen.\"},\"q11\":{\"q\":\"How do I start trading {categoryLabel} markets on Polymarket?\",\"aWithSubcategories\":\"You can browse the {categoryLabel} page to see active markets, open any market such as {featuredMarket1} to view its order book and full rules, and then trade Yes or No shares once your account is funded. The left-side navigation makes it easy to drill into subcategories like {topSubcat1} or {topSubcat2} to focus on the topics you follow most closely.\",\"aGeneric\":\"You can browse the {categoryLabel} page to see active markets, open any market to view its order book and full rules, and then trade Yes or No shares once your account is funded.\"},\"q12\":{\"q\":\"What moves {marketLabel} prediction market prices?\",\"aSpecific\":\"{marketLabel} markets are driven by the same catalysts that move the underlying real-world story: official announcements, scheduled events and deadlines, data and reporting, and major news. <style>
    /* Banner background */
    #smart-banner {
      background-color: var(--color-background) !important;
    }

    /* All banner text (font + color) */
    #smart-banner [data-af-custom-fonts="af-creatives-text"] {
      font-family: var(--font-inter, "Inter"), sans-serif !important;
      color: var(--color-text-primary) !important;
    }
  
    /* CTA button "pill" background — lives on the parent div of the actual <button> */
    #smart-banner div:has(> [data-af-cta-button="true"]) {
      background-color: var(--color-bg-brand) !important;
    }

    /* CTA button label */
    #smart-banner [data-af-cta-button="true"] {
      color: var(--color-button-primary-text) !important;
      font-family: var(--font-inter, "Inter"), sans-serif !important;
    }

    /* Close (X) icon — currently hardcoded white; needs to be dark on light bg */
    #smart-banner [data-af-close-button="true"] svg path {
      fill: var(--color-text-primary) !important;
    }
